subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having made me a captive in the hands of the oppressors in Thy path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما جعلتنی اسیرا بایدی الظالمین فی سبیلک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
